blended.narrative: Big Sky is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,770 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 55".
